description: My particular opinion is that it is a great tool from cisco since it is very intuitive. Also, Cisco adds a layer of DNS-based protection against malware, which is very useful.
author: Leonardo M.
pros: What I like the most about this device is its stability because it protects against malware and phishing in real time, and its stability in the cloud. organization. Besides the fact that the client interface is very intuitive.
cons: Having used this kit myself, I have not found a single fault as it is very easy to set up. Also, apart from the fact that we only have to configure what and how we want to protect and add PCs, we are quite comfortable with this product.

description: The deployment experience with Cisco Umbrella is notably smooth and fast—DNS-layer integration can be rolled out in hours, not days. For an organization with global sites, mobile users, and third-party contractors, Umbrella simplifies protection without requiring heavy infrastructure or VPN dependencies.
author: Adir B.
pros: Ambrella acts as the first line of defense by blocking access to malicious domains at the DNS level, before a connection is ever established.
cons: This early-stage protection is vital in environments with legacy systems or remote operations (e.g., R&D labs, remote sites like Neot Hovav or Beit Shemesh).
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Solid Security Software with Room for Improvement in Support
description: Overall, our experience with Cisco Umbrella has been positive. There are some negative changes that are expected when a smaller company is acquired by a large corporation.
author: Eli P.
pros: Cisco Umbrella effective helps prevent malicious activity and implement content filtering by utilizing DNS filtering.
cons: Product support since the company was acquired by Cisco has been inferior to the level of support provided by OpenDNS. Forced integration with Cisco mobile client is unwelcome.

description: We’ve had fewer security issues and urgent calls. It’s saved us time and money, making our network safer with much less hassle.
author: Garcia L.
pros: Cisco Umbrella works silently at the background fending off threats, so I don't lose sleep over every new link my team discovers. Installation was a cakewalk, and daily maintenance requires seconds. The comfort is real.
cons: Sometimes, the customer support is late to respond, and some of the antivirus choices took me forever to locate as a new user.

description: I enjoy using Cisco and trust them with all patient information that is within the system and know that their information is protected.
author: Loganne Y.
pros: We use Cisco in our hospital across the board and it is well liked and acknowledged as user friendly and easy to use.
cons: There isn’t anything coming to mind when I think of what I like least other than updates can sometimes take longer than expected.

author: Robert P.
pros: Cloud based so it is easy to manage, deploy and maintain.
cons: The cost can be a little high but over all I believe it to be worth it.

review_title: The best way to safety with umbrella
description: For us, the particular use of this tool has been one of the best that we have been able to implement since it is very easy to use as well as providing us with an excellent security layer, although many similar products can be obtained, we had the opportunity to use cisco umbrella, which allowed us to improve gradually.
author: Ernesto B.
pros: What we like the most about this tool are the web filters that it has since that option can be applied to different categories, in addition to that it has the option to block specific web pages. And not only that, but also the traffic and DNS services are of very good quality.
cons: To be totally honest with the use we have had with this tool, we feel very happy during all this time that we have been using it. We have not found any errors in the product.

review_title: Cisco Umbrella - great web security gateway & Internet security tool
description: Umbrella is great at providing visibility and security into our remote endpoints.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to manage and set up, great application support. Protects security for our remote endpoints.
cons: Data leak prevention system is missing or inadequate. Reporting is too basic and generic.

review_title: Good URL - application filter for the money
description: Overall we're happy that we get what we pay for. We would love for the administration (copy policies, etc) to be improved and wish the reporting were better.
author: Tom A.
pros: It's reasonably priced, offers critical DNS level protection, does an ok job at filtering web applications, fast/easy deployment
cons: Reporting is not good, user forms for reporting issues do not convey enough/correct information to the administrators, cannot copy one policy to a new one

author: Alejandro M.
pros: Once you set it up works very good protecting you from potential threats.
cons: Takes some time to set it up and could give you problems with other apps you have

description: Duo Security es una solución de muy alta calidad, ideal para empresas que priorizan la seguridad sin sacrificar la usabilidad.
author: Andres S.
pros: Altísimo nivel de seguridad. Experiencia de usuario muy fluida. Adaptado al trabajo remoto y dispositivos personales.
cons: Coste elevado en funciones avanzadas. Configuración inicial avanzada si se requieren políticas detalladas.

review_title: Un herramienta indispensable para la seguridad de la privacidad
author: daniel R.
pros: Su protección eficiente contra amenazas del internet, usa el DNS para bloquear sitios de web maliciosos.
cons: Una desventaja seria que dependiendo del tamaño y necesidad aumenta su costo

author: Corey C.
pros: It was easy to use and simple to connect to VPN
cons: The timeout settings were annoying, but we figured out how to work around them.

review_title: The best dns security on the market
author: John L.
pros: A lot. We though we were blocking the most dangerous urls with our web filtering, but this is something else. You can see a lot of dns requests being blocked that the user is not even aware of. Also blocking newly seen domains as standard is a nice feature
cons: There are still quite a few false positives, for example an auto discover request for what I presume is office365

author: Alexander M.
pros: The amount of information is great. The intell integrated within the product.
cons: The product is not helping the client to resolve or find security issues.Same structure as firewall rules.

review_title: ¿Cisco Umbrella es bueno para tu ciberseguridad?
description: Para mi punto de vista es un herramienta valiosa que cada empresa que maneja atención cibernética (atención al cliente) debería tener a su disposición.
author: Matias Adrian R.
pros: Permite visualizar todo el tráfico tanto si están o no conectados por ende es un herramienta valiosa para ver el trafico cibernético.
cons: Una desventaja que he visto es que al ser un herramienta con suscripción puede tener una consideración con el precio, esto influye bastante si el grupo de trabajadores es de mas de 5 personas, esto es debido a su precio establecido.

review_title: Software muy caro para lo que ofrece
author: Pedro A.
pros: El filtrado web a traves de su DNS.El filtrado por categorías.Reconoce muy bien el software de cada ordenador.
cons: Es posible saltartelo a traves de usar dns over https.Se debe usar en un entorno homogeneo en e que existan politicas de software.No es valido para centro wifis públicas o de educación.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
